title: [Beacon Hall, Brewpub Locker]
description: Stout wooden kegs, each banded with iron and stamped with a white lighthouse emblem, are stacked upon one another against the walls of this room.  A long silver mirror, somewhat burnt and warped at the edges, sits in a corner beneath a colorful round lantern, the flickering flame within casting long shadows around the cellar.

wayto.28739: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go opening'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go opening'; end
